name: GAP3
tagline: A Digital Studio with a Backstory.
description:
At GAP3, we help brands, businesses, and creators turn ideas into powerful digital experiences.

From website design and eCommerce to UI/UX, content, and SEO — we blend creative thinking, clean code, and strategic insight to build digital assets that not only look great, but actually perform.

GAP3 was founded on real relationships and a deep passion for problem-solving. Our name is inspired by the initials of five close friends who supported our early tech journey — a tribute to the power of support and shared ambition.

Today, we’re a lean and focused freelance digital agency offering a wide range of web services tailored to startups, solo entrepreneurs, small businesses, and marketing teams.

Whether you’re launching your first site, redesigning your brand, or growing your digital reach — we can help you get there with strategy, creativity, and precision.

Let’s build something smart, beautiful, and scalable — together.

As we evolve, Software Co is becoming one of the world’s most comprehensive AI-native development and growth platforms, a unified environment where human expertise and intelligent automation combine to deliver unmatched speed, quality, creativity, and commercial impact.

We are ISO 9001:2015 (Quality Management) and ISO/IEC 27001:2013 (Information Security Management) certified, upholding rigorous global standards of engineering excellence, security, and operational governance across every engagement.

similarOrganizations.name: WESolutions
similarOrganizations.description:
WESolutions was founded by a team of Healthcare professional who believed that the Healthcare sector needed partners in creating cost effective recruitment solutions for the industry. 

WESolutions specialise in project management of mass volume recruitment, with projects ranging from 5 to 50+ applicants. We do this by either initiating international projects, or taking complete control of your HR and recruitment functions and offering our RPO service.

Our team’s modus operandi is and always will be to deliver a service with integrity and transparency that is beneficial not only to our client’s but also to our candidate’s.
International healthcare professionals provide an opportunity to fill a large number of vacancies within a wide range of specialities, whilst still being a cost effective solution – allowing our clients to use economies of scale to help solve their workforce issues. 

This is a process that warrants a dedicated and proactive approach, ensuring you have the best possible pool of talent to choose from. With a greater understanding of the current market and a large network reach, we are able to recruit from most of Europe, Philippines, India, Australia and New Zealand.
 
All of our solutions are custom-built after assessing and understanding your recruitment requirements and business needs.  You will be assigned a Project Partner that will facilitate you solutions from inception to implementation.

Our support team will ensure that all applicants are fully compliant within framework regulations and that candidate retention is of the highest priority.

similarOrganizations.name: ESQ Solutions
similarOrganizations.description:
ESQ Solutions gelooft dat elk individu en elke organisatie kan groeien inzake kwaliteit, milieu en welzijn. Vanuit onze ESQ-waarden (ontwikkeling, betrokkenheid, professionalisme en werkplezier) willen wij deze groei bevorderen.
Dit doen we door het ondersteunen van bedrijven bij de wettelijke thema’s (milieu & preventie), door het opzetten van werkbare managementsystemen (ISO & VCA) en door het ontwikkelen van een cultuur die gebaseerd is op zorg voor elkaar (BBS).
ESQ heeft een hands-on programma om duurzaamheid te integreren in de bedrijfsvoering. We zetten eveneens in op bedrijfsinterne opleidingen over deze thema’s en op het creëren van een grote betrokkenheid in alle lagen van de organisaties waar we actief zijn.
Samen met HCM² verzorgen wij spelconcepten bij bedrijven om het bewustzijn inzake kwaliteit, welzijn en milieu te verhogen!

similarOrganizations.name: Tatvic ®
similarOrganizations.description:
For over 15 years, Tatvic has been a trusted force in the marketing technology ecosystem, driving digital transformation for businesses across North America, APAC, and India. As a Google Premium Partner and early advocate of AI-first strategies, we’ve helped brands move beyond marketing execution to marketing efficacy.

Our story began with a simple yet powerful mission: to make marketing smarter, faster, and more human-centered. That mission now takes a bold new form through Agentic AI for Marketing Transformation, Tatvic’s pioneering approach that fuses intelligent automation with decision-making autonomy.

🔹From Automation to Transformation

Tatvic’s Agentic AI solutions not only automate tasks but also empower smarter, faster marketing across every stage:

> Campaign Planning: Predictive market research & advanced analytics for data-led strategy
> Campaign Orchestration: AI-powered campaign management, smart email automation flows and scalable content creation and delivery
> Campaign Analysis: Autonomous SEO & campaign optimization & real-time performance insights for continuous improvement


🔹Driven by Data, Powered by Experience

With our deep expertise in Conversion Rate Optimization (CRO), Google Analytics, DV360, BigQuery, and Cloud platforms, we deliver full-stack marketing solutions that are both data-rich and action-ready. Whether it’s refining user journeys or scaling experimentation, Tatvic is built to help brands move faster, with clarity and confidence.

🔹What Sets Tatvic Apart?

1. Pioneers in Marketing Efficacy: We don’t just measure; we improve what matters.
2. CRO Trailblazers: First in India to earn Google’s coveted CRO partner status
3. Global Experience: Solutions tailored across diverse markets and verticals
4. Full-Stack Martech: From insight to execution under one roof
5. Agentic AI Advantage: Automate intelligently, decide autonomously, scale exponentially

At Tatvic, we believe the future of marketing isn’t just digital, it’s agentic.

similarOrganizations.name: MHP
similarOrganizations.description:
MHP is an international food and agri company, which produces high-quality healthy food products that enhance its consumers' lives. MHP ‘s operations span across the agriculture, logistics, food production, and retail sectors, with manufacturing facilities across Ukraine and South-Eastern Europe, alongside subsidiaries in the UK, UAE, Saudi Arabia, the Netherlands, and other EU countries.  
MHP’s shares are listed on the London Stock Exchange. Employing over 36,000 people in Ukraine and abroad, MHP is ranked among Ukraine’s top 20 employers, according to Forbes Ukraine. 
 
Amid the full-scale war, the company considers it its mission to support Ukraine’s economy and ensure food security. MHP is the largest single taxpayer across Ukraine’sagricultural sector and was recognised by Forbes Ukraine and NV as one of the country’s top investors in 2024. MHP is the leading poultry producer in Europe and ranks among the top 10 poultry producers worldwide, according to the WattPoultry ranking. 
MHP develops over 15 food brands, including Nasha Ryaba, Apetytna, Lehko!, Bashchynskyi, Skott Smeat, RyabChick, and more. 
 
To ensure Ukrainians always have access to high-quality, tasty food, the company, together with its partners, operates retail stores and food outlets across the country — including MeatMarket, Fresh Food, Nasha Ryaba stores, and Döner Market fast food locations. 
 
Together with its strategic partner, the Charitable Foundation MHP-Hromadi, the company supports Ukrainians, fosters community development, and preserves Ukrainian culture. To provide personalised assistance and comprehensive support to members of the armed forces, veterans, and their families, MHP has designed and implemented  the MHP Standing Together programme. 
 
The founder and CEO of MHP is Ukrainian businessman Yuriy Kosyuk.

similarOrganizations.name: Shiprocket
similarOrganizations.description:
Shiprocket is India’s largest eCommerce enablement platform providing digital retailers an end-to-end customer experience platform. The platform which is creating an operating system for direct commerce enables shipping, fulfillment, customer communication and marketing tools as well as providers for SMEs, D2C retailers, and social commerce retailers in India. With 25+ courier partners on board, the brand enables pan-India as well as international shipping deliveries. Its shipping solutions are available across 24,000+ pin codes within India and 220 countries worldwide.

Launched in 2017, Shiprocket is on a mission to create a seamless logistics data platform that connects retailers, carriers, and consumers across national and international locations. Shiprocket provides a technology stack to help retailers integrate their shopping websites on Shopify, Magento, Woocommerce, Zoho, or others with the platform’s multi-carrier API to manage orders, print shipping labels, and avail tracking information from multiple providers including managing Cash on Delivery (COD) orders and payment reconciliation. Shiprocket also offers state-of-the-art fulfillment solutions with more than 35+ warehouses located across India. The technology stack provides a robust post-purchase experience to consumers, resulting in higher engagement and lower RTO (failed deliveries).

Today, Shiprocket is the platform behind 2.5 lakh plus sellers who generate a GMV of more than $2.5B annually. The platform delivers packets to more than 70M consumers annually and is growing transactions 2.5-3X year on year.

similarOrganizations.description: FTV Capital is a growth equity investment firm that has raised over $10.2 billion to invest in high-growth companies offering a range of innovative solutions in financial technology and services, vertical software, enterprise technology and services, and healthcare technology and services. FTV’s experienced team leverages its domain expertise and proven track record in these sectors to help motivated management teams accelerate growth. FTV also provides companies with access to FTV Propel®, experienced executives dedicated to driving value for our portfolio companies across a range of business functions, and FTV's Global Partner Network®, a group of the world’s leading enterprises and executives who have helped our portfolio companies for over 28 years. Founded in 1998, FTV Capital has invested in over 150 portfolio companies. FTV has offices in New York, San Francisco, London and Connecticut.

similarOrganizations.name: Oister Global
similarOrganizations.description:
Oister is India’s Premier Alternative Assets Manager

We provide access, expertise, and value creation across top-tier private market opportunities, with a focus on differentiated secondary transactions in late-stage, high-growth companies. 

We manage proprietary funds, invest in PE/VC funds and secondary opportunities, and partner with CRISIL to publish the industry’s leading annual benchmarking report on private equity and venture capital. 

Since our launch, we have invested in eight top-tier funds, backing 50+ high-growth companies, all within a high-performance, deeply selective investment ecosystem. 

At Oister, we deliver precision, transparency, and curated high- quality opportunities, empowering qualified investors to participate meaningfully in private markets in collaboration with leading Private Banks and Wealth Managers.

similarOrganizations.name: Kraken
similarOrganizations.description:
Kraken is one of the world’s longest-standing and most secure crypto platforms. Our mission is to accelerate the global adoption of crypto, so that everyone can achieve financial freedom and inclusion. Globally, Kraken clients trade more than 200 digital assets and 6 different national currencies, including GBP, EUR, USD, CAD, CHF, and AUD.

Kraken was founded in 2011 and was one of the first platforms to offer spot trading with margin, parachain auctions, staking, regulated derivatives and index services. 

Trusted by over 10 million individuals, traders and institutions around the world, Kraken offers professional 24/7/365 client support along with one of the fastest, most performant trading platforms available. Kraken has set the industry standard for transparency and client trust, and was the first crypto platform to conduct Proof of Reserves audits. 

In 2024, Kraken ranked 12th in Newsweek's Global Top 100 list of Most Loved Workplaces, recognizing how the platform offers one of the world's most compelling employment opportunities.

Risk Disclosure: https://www.kraken.com/en-ca/social-media-disclosure

similarOrganizations.name: Kauffman Fellows
similarOrganizations.description:
Since 1995, Kauffman Fellows has accelerated the development and success of venture capital investors around the world, supporting Fellows to navigate every aspect of innovation investing, from deal flow to public markets. With 800+ Fellows across 65 countries, Kauffman Fellows is the largest network of VCs and innovation leaders in the world. In the 27 years since inception, Kauffman Fellows have started hundreds of funds, raised and deployed hundreds of billions of dollars in capital, and helped pave the way for some of the world’s most groundbreaking companies. As a network, Kauffman Fellows represent over $290 billion in assets under management, have collectively raised over $790 billion dollars in capital, and have been responsible for over $8.5 trillion in exits to LPs.

For more information visit www.kauffmanfellows.org

similarOrganizations.name: YourNest Venture Capital
similarOrganizations.description:
YourNest Venture Capital is a sharply focused 'Pre-Series A' fund house that was established in 2011 to nurture global market leaders from India. It invests in technology-led, enterprise-driven (B2B) and DeepTech (IoT, SaaS) startups. We are seeing India swiftly shift from an IT service outsourcing-hub to an IP/Patent driven 'Product Nation' with compelling investment opportunities. 

Our first fund of US$ 14 mn, started in 2012, and invested in 16 companies.  It helped YourNest to be ranked as the Youngest VC firm in Preqin’s Top 10 Alternative Assets (2017).

Having completely invested this first fund, YourNest launched its second fund of US$ 30 in 2017 mn and has invested in 19 Indian startups with a focus on DeepTech. As of March 2021, CRISIL ranked it 7th among 48 AIFs launched in FY17. 

While several exits have been taking place from both funds, some of the Fund II portfolio companies – including Miko, Dozee and Exponent Energy – have already shown early promise of being Dragons i.e. companies that can potentially return the entire fund corpus in a single exit.

The current fund – YourNest Innovative Products VC Fund III – was launched in 2021 and is likely to close at US$ 100 mn, after exercising the greenshoe option. It has already invested in seven companies – including crossover investments in three existing portfolio companies.

In a country where entrepreneurship is encouraged but comes with its own challenges, the Indian DeepTech eco-system is rapidly evolving. Adept at identifying daring founders who we call ‘Challengineers’ and emerging ideas, the YourNest team of four general partners include a business builder, a leadership coach, a global technology leader, an analyst and a technologist. As local Fund Managers they operate as unified enablers to nurture and guide our portfolio companies to global success as they benefit from our experience, networks and resources worldwide to build enterprises that dominate markets.
